emails.subject: Gregg agreement
emails.body: Gerald Where do you stand on reviewing the Gregg agreement? Just a quick update, please. Thanks, Chris Sonneborn HPL Facility Planning

emails.subject: Re: Gregg agreement
emails.body: Re: Gregg agreement Check's in the mail. Sorry for the delay, I will review today. Chris Sonneborn 06/30/2000 09:50 AM

emails.subject: Gregg Agreement
emails.body: Chris attached is a clean and redline version of the Gregg Agreement with my revisions. The form Gregg sent was the original form they had forwarded for the first project. I change to reflect the change we made at that time. As you will notice it is quite a few changes. However, since Gregg signed off on this form once already, they shouldn't have a problem doing it again. Let me know if you have any questions.
